name: @vaipakam/labs
description: Vaipakam marketing + docs Vite SPA — labs.vaipakam.com (and www.vaipakam.com / vaipakam.com on cutover). NO wallet connect, NO wagmi — just a chain picker for public-read transparency stats. Hosted as a Cloudflare Workers Static Assets deploy on the same shape apps/defi uses, but with a tighter dependency surface (no connectkit, no react-router protected routes, no per-action permissioning). STUB — Stage 4 of the source-tree refactor will populate src/pages/ from apps/defi/'s marketing surfaces (Landing, BuyVPFI marketing, Overview, UserGuide-Basic, Whitepaper).
